events.name: Seattle May Day Rally and March
events.description: National day of action with rally at Cal Anderson Park followed by march downtown. Messages focus on communities over ICE, workers over billionaires, and services over war.

events.name: Oregon Ducks at Washington Huskies Baseball
events.description: Pac-12 baseball matchup between Oregon Ducks and Washington Huskies at Husky Ballpark.

events.name: Las Vegas Aviators at Tacoma Rainiers
events.description: Minor league baseball action as the Tacoma Rainiers host the Las Vegas Aviators.

events.name: Treaty Oak Revival - West Texas Degenerate Tour
events.description: Treaty Oak Revival brings their West Texas Degenerate Tour to Seattle's WAMU Theater for an unforgettable night of live music.

events.name: The Cribs at The Sunset Tavern
events.description: The Cribs perform live at The Sunset Tavern in Ballard.

events.name: Sam Shackleton at Tractor Tavern
events.description: Sam Shackleton headlines at Tractor Tavern in Ballard.

top_pick.name: Seattle May Day Rally and March
top_pick.description: The biggest event of the day is the May Day rally and march, starting at Cal Anderson Park at 2 PM and proceeding downtown. Organizers are calling for 'No Work, No School, No Shopping' to emphasize messages about workers' rights, immigration, and anti-war sentiment.
